payload.description: Kickoff meeting for Bx6 SBS

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Kickoff meeting (November 2015) • On street outreach (November 2015 – March 2016) – During AM peak at five locations – Received 431 individual comments and distributed over 1,050 Bx6 SBS information cards in English and Spanish • Online feedback portal (launched November 2015) – Received 51 location-specific comments • Elected officials briefing (April 2016) • Top comments:
